description: 5 test cases for benchmarking adversarial vs standard convergence. Each sample has a task and ground-truth flaws.

samples.title: Python function review
Markdown article review
samples.task:
Review this article intro for accuracy:

"Multi-agent systems eliminate all bias by using multiple LLMs."
groundTruthFlaws: Claim is false — multiple LLMs can share biases

samples.title: API response review
samples.task:
Review this API response shape:

{ "status": 200, "data": null, "error": "not found" }

samples.title: SQL query review
samples.task:
Review this SQL query:

SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '

samples.title: React component review
groundTruthFlaws: count is not state — won't re-render
Mutating a local variable is a no-op in React
